oshi/src/main/java/com/example/CPUInfo.j.general_idea: Replaced naive single-call CPU load retrieval with a robust two-snapshot approach using `getSystemCpuLoadBetweenTicks` and `getProcessorCpuLoadBetweenTicks` to accurately measure load over a time interval.
oshi/src/main/java/com/example/CPUInfo.j.human_impl: long[] prevSysTicks = processor.getSystemCpuLoadTicks(); ... TimeUnit.MILLISECONDS.sleep(interval); ... double systemLoad = processor.getSystemCpuLoadBetweenTicks(prevSysTicks);

oshi/src/main/java/com/example/CPUInfo.j.general_idea: Added validation and sanitization for CPU metrics to handle platform-specific quirks like NaN values, negative numbers, or zero frequencies returned by the OS.
Expanded the static CPU information display to include detailed processor identifier details (vendor, name) and physical/logical core counts.
oshi/src/main/java/com/example/CPUInfo.j.human_impl: ProcessorIdentifier id = processor.getProcessorIdentifier(); System.out.println("CPU Model: " + id.getName());

oshi/src/main/java/com/example/CPUInfo.j.general_idea: Implemented human-readable formatting for CPU frequencies using OSHI's `FormatUtil` and a custom helper method to convert Hz to MHz/GHz.
Added retrieval of system uptime via `si.getOperatingSystem().getSystemUptime()` with exception handling for compatibility.
Rewrote the class Javadoc to accurately describe the new robust sampling logic and defensive checks implemented in the migration.
oshi/src/main/java/com/example/CPUInfo.j.human_impl: /** * Validated and more robust CPU info sampler using OSHI. * - Safely computes system and per-core CPU % using between-ticks snapshots. ... */

oshi/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Maven compiler source, target, and release properties from Java 17 to Java 21.
Configure maven-compiler-plugin to explicitly use Java 21 for compilation.
Add SLF4J API dependency for logging abstraction.
Add SLF4J Simple implementation dependency for runtime logging.
Replace JUnit 4 with JUnit 5 (Jupiter) for modern testing support.
Add Maven Surefire plugin to execute JUnit 5 tests.
Add Maven Jar plugin to configure the main class in the manifest.
Add Maven Shade plugin to create an executable fat JAR with dependencies.
Update OSHI core library version and externalize it to a property.
Rename the project artifact ID and name to reflect network information focus.
